allow: PowerShell(Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "postgresql|memurai" } | Format-Table Name, Status, StartType -Auto)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "sentinex"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "CREATE USER sentinex WITH PASSWORD 'sentinex' SUPERUSER CREATEDB;" 2>&1; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "CREATE DATABASE sentinex OWNER sentinex;" 2>&1; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "CREATE DATABASE sentinex_test OWNER sentinex;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $url = "https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector/archive/refs/tags/v0.8.0.zip"; $out = "$env:TEMP\\pgvector.zip"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out; Write-Output "Downloaded source. Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.dev poetry run python -c "from django.core.management import get_commands; cmds = get_commands\(\); print\('create_tenant from:', cmds.get\('create_tenant'\)\)")
Bash(DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=config.settings.dev poetry run python -c "import django; django.setup\(\); from django.core.management import get_commands; print\(list\(get_commands\(\).keys\(\)\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "sentinex"; $psql = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe"; & $psql -U sentinex -h localhost -d postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS sentinex;" 2>&1; & $psql -U sentinex -h localhost -d postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS sentinex_test;" 2>&1; & $psql -U sentinex -h localhost -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE sentinex OWNER sentinex;" 2>&1; & $psql -U sentinex -h localhost -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE sentinex_test OWNER sentinex;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "sentinex"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe" -U sentinex -h localhost -d postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS test_sentinex;" 2>&1; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\16\\bin\\psql.exe" -U sentinex -h localhost -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE test_sentinex OWNER sentinex;" 2>&1)
